title: The Visual Age of the Eva crew
display_title: The Visual Age of the Eva crew
wikitext:
[]: The (Visual) Age of the Eva crew             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Thu Apr 29, 2010 7:19 am Just a fun thing to ask. From an objective perspective, or for one that has never seen or heard Eva, what would you guess the cast's age? You know, looking at screenshots and official artwork from Sadamoto (Who put a lot more curves than a pre-teen girl should have sometimes >_>). Here's my pick: Shinji:Around 13-14 Asuka:16-17 Rei: 16-17 Misato: 22-26 Ritsuko: Late 20's Gendo: Mid 40's Fuyutski: Early 50's

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Thu Apr 29, 2010 8:14 am Depends on animator/illustrator and context... "Objective" determination of cartoon characters' ages, who by their nature tend to be simplified/stylized, by visuals alone, seems like an entirely futile task. It's not as futile in NGE as in many others shows, but just keep things in perspective. It's hard enough getting the ages correct of everyone you meet IRL. Also, every time we hear someone complain that Asuka or Rei look too developed for their purported age, someone else reports that they knew 13/14-year-olds with T&A. (Clearly, we need to grab our field binoculars and tape measures and gather T&A data from a healthy sampling of middle school girls across the world.) (I swear there's a thread like this somewhere, but I'm too tired to look.)

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Thu Apr 29, 2010 8:25 am That other thread was talking about the maturity level and psychological what-not. This is more to poke fun at the animation-trope of saying an age but drawing something else (like most anime MILFs, for example)

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Apr 29, 2010 8:30 am This girl is fourteen: SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Thu Apr 29, 2010 8:34 am Now Yoko can be explained. They say she's 14, but in her village time. Different villages track time differently, so she can be 17-18 in Simon's village for example.

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Thu Apr 29, 2010 9:42 am When did they actually state Yoko's age btw? I'm not sure why, but if she really is 14 by our standards I somehow dislike her even more.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Thu Apr 29, 2010 9:54 am In an interview somewhere, I can't remember right now. She's not 14 in our years, but 14 in her village (Like how some Koreans add the New Years to their age in addition to their regular birthday so a 16 age would be 17)

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Apr 29, 2010 1:15 pm Everyone should know that anime girls can have huge racks when they are 9, but are flat as boards by the time they get to 17.

[]:             Quote Post by NatTheWriter » Thu Apr 29, 2010 2:33 pm Depends on the artist/animator. .__. The art in episodes 3 and 6 made Shinji and Rei look like ten-year-olds.

[]:             Quote Post by Peewit » Thu Apr 29, 2010 5:02 pm I'd have said the 3 pilots were 15 - 16 year olds (well developed ones at that).

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Apr 29, 2010 5:51 pm Gendo: 40 and Fuyutsuki: 50? I'm sorry, but... Let's be serious around here... I say Gendo: late 30's and Fuyutsuki: early to mid 40's. Plus, Asuka at age 16-17 does make sense... Also, Misato at age 22-26... boy, you made me feel younger!

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Thu Apr 29, 2010 6:04 pm The female pilots only look well-endowed in plugsuits - elsewhere, and in the nude, they appear age appropriate - compare plugsuit Rei to nude Rei, there is a huge difference.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Apr 29, 2010 6:09 pm Vegeta 20XX wrote: The female pilots only look well-endowed in plugsuits - elsewhere, and in the nude, they appear age appropriate - compare plugsuit Rei to nude Rei, there is a huge difference.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Apr 29, 2010 6:30 pm tomrule123 wrote: Gendo: 40 and Fuyutsuki: 50? I'm sorry, but... Let's be serious around here... I say Gendo: late 30's and Fuyutsuki: early to mid 40's.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Apr 29, 2010 6:38 pm Sachi wrote: I would say that Gendo looks no younger than forty during the show, and Fuyutsuki looks much more aged by at least eight to ten or more years, appearance-wise anyways.

[]:             Quote Post by planet news » Thu Apr 29, 2010 6:44 pm Ask yourself this: what is physical age in a face? Answer: skin wrinkles, pigment, hair color. Since only Gendo and Fuyutsuki have any substantial wrinkle rendering, the ages of the others must remain below 30 when most people begin developing some noticeables in their skin.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Apr 29, 2010 6:48 pm planet news wrote: Ask yourself this: what is physical age in a face? Answer: skin wrinkles, pigment, hair color. Since only Gendo and Fuyutsuki have any substantial wrinkle rendering, the ages of the others must remain below 30 when most people begin developing some noticeables in their skin.

[]:             Quote Post by carla » Mon May 03, 2010 12:46 pm Shinji always looked 13-ish to me. Rei looked about 14-ish as well (of course, then she opened her mouth and... yep, hayashibara megumi makes her come across as older somehow. or maybe i'm superimposing yui's image on her). Asuka... had her moments; at some points she looked her age, at some points she looked older, like 16 or so. Misato i always thought was in her late 20's. Kaji seemed a couple years older, maybe 30-ish. ritsuko, though, always came off looking way older than them IMO. i honestly thought she was 40-something until she mentioned being the same age as Misato. (don't kill me, tines-san!) hmm, maybe it was the clothes. dark hose always feels very 80's to me. gendo was in his early forties, probably. fuyutsuki always looked like he was in his late 50's, maybe bordering on 60. as for the bridge bunnies, maya looks the youngest by far, maybe 21-ish. i wouldn't put aoba and hyuuga a day under 24. 25-26, more likely.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon May 03, 2010 1:27 pm carla wrote: ritsuko, though, always came off looking way older than them IMO. i honestly thought she was 40-something until she mentioned being the same age as Misato. (don't kill me, tines-san!)
